title: The Tragedy of Pudd’nhead Wilson
author: Mark Twain
blurb: This book has just about the funniest antagonist I've ever seen put to print. But I mean, it's by Mark Twain. Of course it's funny. Read it!
blurb2: Twain, it's a funny bit creating a single mega-sentence with two colons, two em dashes, five semicolons, and ten commas. But you do make it difficult to format your words into visual novel form.
